title: Zech's Creations
description: Create focused pack with vanilla enhancements
body:
# Zech's Creations

Zech's Creations is a modpack centered around the Create mod, designed for Minecraft 1.21.1.

It features the most popular add-ons for the Create mod, along with some additional Vanilla+ experience mods and optimization mods (like Sodium).

## Create Add-ons:

* [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
* [Create Goggles](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-goggles)
* [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice)
* [Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles)
* [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
* [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)

*More Create add-ons will be integrated as they update to Minecraft 1.21.x.*

To see all included mods, please refer to the latest version's modlist.
